title: Career
description: Join a team of specialist engineers delivering silicon-grade results. We are growing and looking for outstanding people across the IC design and verification flow.

jobs.title: RTL Design Engineer
jobs.summary: Design and implement synthesisable RTL for complex ASIC/FPGA SoC blocks. You will own block-level architecture through to handoff to the physical design team, including synthesis constraints and timing closure.
responsibilities: Write clean, well-constrained SystemVerilog/VHDL RTL
Define micro-architecture documents and RTL coding guidelines
Drive logic synthesis and static timing analysis closure
Collaborate with verification team on DV planning
Support DFT and PD hand-off packages
requirements: 3+ years RTL design experience in ASIC or FPGA
Strong SystemVerilog coding and simulation skills
Familiarity with Synopsys DC or Cadence Genus
Experience with low-power design (UPF/CPF) is a plus
Strong communication and documentation habits

jobs.title: RTL Design Verification Engineer
jobs.summary: Develop and execute comprehensive verification plans for RTL blocks and sub-systems using UVM and industry-standard methodologies to achieve coverage closure.
responsibilities: Build UVM testbenches (agents, sequences, scoreboards)
Write verification plans and coverage models
Develop functional and code coverage metrics
Debug RTL failures and file detailed bug reports
Drive regression automation and sign-off
requirements: 3+ years UVM verification experience
Strong SystemVerilog and SVA skills
Familiarity with VCS/Xcelium or Questa
Experience with protocol VIPs (AXI, AHB, PCIe, etc.) a plus
Familiarity with formal property checking is desirable

jobs.title: AMS Verification Engineer
jobs.summary: Verify mixed-signal IP and SoCs using AMS simulation flows - Spice-to-RTL co-simulation, real-number modelling, and targeted stimulus generation for analog behavioural blocks.
responsibilities: Develop real-number models (RNM) for analog blocks
Set up SPICE-RTL co-simulation environments
Define analog corner coverage and simulation plans
Interface with circuit designers for spec extraction
Drive mixed-signal regression and sign-off
requirements: 3+ years AMS or mixed-signal verification experience
Strong Verilog-AMS or SystemVerilog RNM skills
Experience with Cadence Virtuoso or Spectre
Background in analog circuit fundamentals (ADC/DAC/PLL)
UVM knowledge is a plus

jobs.title: DFT Engineer
jobs.summary: Implement and optimise Design-for-Test architectures - scan insertion, BIST, ATPG pattern generation, and test coverage analysis - across complex ASIC designs from RTL to GDSII.
responsibilities: Define DFT architecture and test strategy
Perform scan insertion and ATPG with Synopsys DFT tools
Implement MBIST and LBIST solutions
Analyse fault and test coverage metrics
Support ATE hand-off and production test development
requirements: 3+ years ASIC DFT implementation experience
Hands-on with Synopsys DFT Compiler / Tessent
Experience with IEEE 1149.1 (JTAG) and 1500
Familiarity with low-power test challenges
Exposure to failure analysis flows is a plus

jobs.title: Embedded Systems Engineer
jobs.summary: Develop firmware and low-level software for custom silicon and FPGA-based systems - bare-metal, RTOS, and Linux BSP development with a focus on hardware-software co-design.
responsibilities: Write bare-metal and RTOS-based firmware in C/C++
Develop Linux BSPs and device drivers for custom SoCs
Implement peripheral and interface drivers (I2C, SPI, UART, PCIe)
HW-SW co-design and board bring-up support
Create system-level integration tests and debug utilities
requirements: 3+ years embedded C/C++ development experience
Experience with ARM Cortex-M/A or RISC-V platforms
Linux kernel module or BSP development experience
Familiarity with hardware debugging tools (JTAG, oscilloscope)
Understanding of hardware interfaces and SoC register maps

jobs.title: Physical Design Engineer
jobs.summary: Implement block-level and chip-level physical design from floorplanning to GDSII - placement, CTS, routing, timing and power sign-off - using leading Cadence/Synopsys P&R tools.
responsibilities: Floorplanning, power planning and pin assignment
Placement optimisation and CTS implementation
Signal routing and timing closure (STA with PrimeTime)
IR drop and electromigration analysis
LVS/DRC sign-off and GDSII tape-out preparation
requirements: 4+ years physical design experience on tapeout projects
Proficient in Cadence Innovus or Synopsys ICC2
Strong STA skills with PrimeTime or Tempus
Experience with advanced nodes (16nm / 7nm / below) a plus
Familiarity with low-power multi-VT optimisation

jobs.title: Custom Layout Engineer
jobs.summary: Create high-performance custom analog and mixed-signal full-custom layout - standard cells, memory macros, and sensitive analog blocks - with a focus on matching, parasitics, and DRC/LVS cleanliness.
responsibilities: Full-custom layout of analog/mixed-signal blocks
Device sizing for matching and parasitic optimisation
DRC and LVS verification and closure
Parasitic extraction and post-layout simulation
GDSII merge and tape-out preparation support
requirements: 4+ years full-custom IC layout experience
Proficient in Cadence Virtuoso Layout Suite
Experience with Calibre DRC/LVS and Star-RC
Knowledge of fin/gate-all-around layout techniques is a plus
Foundry experience (TSMC / Samsung / GF) preferred

openApplicationTitle: Don't see a match? We're always looking for exceptional engineers.
openApplicationDescription: Send an open application with your resume and areas of expertise.
